name: dolphin3-r1-abliterated
readme_html:
This is an uncensored version of cognitivecomputations/Dolphin3.0-R1-Mistral-24B created with abliteration (see remove-refusals-with-transformers to know more about it).
This is a crude, proof-of-concept implementation to remove refusals from an LLM model without using TransformerLens.

References

HuggingFace
